title: Jr. Web Developer
description: DailyPay is transforming the way people get paid. As a worktech company and the industry's leading on demand pay solution, DailyPay uses an award-winning technology platform to help America's top employers build stronger relationships with their employees. Reporting to the Senior Website Manager, the Junior Front-End Developer is responsible for supporting DailyPay's B2B and B2C marketing web ecosystem across WordPress (Elementor) and Contentful. Front-End Development & Customization: Build and maintain marketing pages across WordPress using Elementor and modular components in Contentful. Write custom CSS, JavaScript, and PHP to extend functionality beyond builder defaults. A/B Testing Implementation: Support the technical execution of experiments using CSS overrides, JavaScript DOM manipulation, and conditional rendering logic. Prevent layout shifts and flicker issues. ABM & Personalization Support: Assist in implementing account-based marketing experiences and custom audience journeys. Support integrations with ABM platforms. QA & Cross-Browser Testing: Own structured QA prior to launch, including responsive validation, form submission testing, link validation, tracking verification, and accessibility basics. Conduct thorough cross-browser testing across Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge, and mobile environments. Debugging & Technical Investigation: Use Chrome DevTools extensively to diagnose issues involving layout, performance, tracking, JavaScript conflicts, API/network calls, and third-party scripts. Performance & Technical Hygiene: Support optimization of page speed and Core Web Vitals. Ensure semantic HTML structure, manage CSS specificity cleanly, minimize unnecessary script load.
description_short: DailyPay is transforming the way people get paid. Junior Front-End Developer responsible for supporting B2B and B2C marketing web ecosystem across WordPress (Elementor) and Contentful. Build and maintain marketing pages, implement A/B tests, support ABM personalization, conduct QA and cross-browser testing, debug with Chrome DevTools, and optimize Core Web Vitals.
